name: American Debt Enders
description_short: American Debt Enders offers debt consolidation, settlement, and credit counseling services nationwide with no upfront fees to consumers.
description_long:
American Debt Enders is a debt relief company based in Lynbrook, NY, operating at 265 Sunrise Highway. The company positions itself as a nationally-ranked provider by ConsumerReviews.com and emphasizes a no-fee model where consumers do not pay upfront charges for services.

The company's core service offerings include debt consolidation, debt settlement, Federal Student Loan consolidation, Chapter 7 bankruptcy counseling, and credit restoration. They provide free credit counseling and claim to serve the United States with some state-based restrictions. The business operates during extended hours (10 AM–8 PM weekdays, 10 AM–3 PM Saturday) and is reachable at (877) 766-2465 or through their website americandebtenders.com.

American Debt Enders differentiates itself primarily through its no-upfront-fee model and the breadth of services offered under one roof—combining debt settlement, consolidation, student loan consolidation, and bankruptcy counseling. The company emphasizes accessibility by offering free initial guidance even for consumers uncertain whether they need formal services.

A significant caveat exists: the company has a 1.0-star rating based on one visible review from December 2019. The incomplete review from consumer Greg W. references Richard Garcia as their contact and mentions the company referred them to another provider, but the full review text is cut off. This single negative rating and lack of additional transparent reviews substantially undermine confidence in the company's service quality and consumer satisfaction, warranting caution.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.
pros: No upfront fees charged to consumers for services
Free credit counseling available to all inquiries
Multiple debt relief solutions under one provider (consolidation, settlement, student loans, bankruptcy counseling)
Extended business hours (10 AM–8 PM weekdays)
Serves most U.S. states with geographic flexibility
Offers guidance even for consumers uncertain about their needs
cons: Only 1-star rating visible with limited review transparency and incomplete review text
Single documented customer review from 2019 suggests limited recent feedback or marketing of reviews
Vague service area restrictions ('few state restrictions') not clearly specified
No details on pricing structure, payment terms, or how the no-fee model is monetized
Limited transparency on company credentials, certifications, or regulatory compliance status
best_for: Consumers with multiple types of debt (credit cards, personal loans, student loans) seeking consolidated solutions
Individuals considering bankruptcy who want free counseling before committing
Debt-burdened consumers who cannot afford upfront service fees
diagnosis: American Debt Enders is best suited for multi-debt consumers seeking consolidated relief solutions with no upfront costs. However, the severe scarcity of verifiable recent consumer reviews (only one 1-star rating from 2019) and lack of transparent feedback make it difficult to assess current service quality or legitimacy—prospective clients should independently verify credentials and seek additional third-party reviews before engaging.
meta_title: American Debt Enders (Lynbrook, New York) | CreditDoc
meta_description: American Debt Enders offers debt consolidation, settlement, and credit counseling services nationwide with no upfront fees to consumers.
